title: Random Circuit Sampling: Theory and Implementation
description: Deep dive into random circuit sampling as a quantum supremacy benchmark, covering circuit architectures, anti-concentration, Porter-Thomas distribution, and simulation hardness.
learningObjectives: Understand why random circuit sampling is hard for classical computers
Implement random circuit generation with various gate sets
Analyze the Porter-Thomas distribution and anti-concentration property
Evaluate simulation complexity using tensor network methods
Design circuits optimized for quantum supremacy demonstrations
